Graphics functions and structures for bitmaps, framebuffers, draw commands, paths, transformations, text, and UTF-8.

## Folders
- **[1_bit](1_bit/README.md)**: Functions and structures for 1-bit graphics operations, including bit block transfer and framebuffer management.
- **[8_bit](8_bit/README.md)**: Functions and structures for 8-bit framebuffer management and tiled bitmap compositing.
- **[assets_temp](assets_temp/README.md)**: Defines a static array of bytes for a pug image bitmap resource.

## Files
- **[bitblt.c](bitblt.c.md)**: Functions for bit-block transfer operations with compositing modes and color tinting in 1-bit graphics.
- **[bitblt.h](bitblt.h.md)**: Functions for bitmap operations including tiling, compositing, and checking compositing modes.
- **[bitblt_private.h](bitblt_private.h.md)**: Functions for bit block transfer operations between bitmaps with different bit depths and compositing modes.
- **[framebuffer.c](framebuffer.c.md)**: Bitdepth-independent routines for framebuffer initialization, manipulation, and state management.
- **[framebuffer.h](framebuffer.h.md)**: Functions and definitions for managing and manipulating a framebuffer in a graphics application.
- **[gbitmap.c](gbitmap.c.md)**: Functions and utilities for creating, initializing, and managing GBitmap objects in various formats.
- **[gbitmap_pbi.h](gbitmap_pbi.h.md)**: Defines the PBI file format for uncompressed bitmap images with color-mapping palettes.
- **[gbitmap_png.c](gbitmap_png.c.md)**: Functions for decoding PNG images into GBitmap objects, including palette creation and format support checks.
- **[gbitmap_png.h](gbitmap_png.h.md)**: Functions and documentation for handling PNG8 images in the Pebble firmware, including creation and palette management.
- **[gbitmap_sequence.c](gbitmap_sequence.c.md)**: Functions and utilities for managing and manipulating animated PNG sequences in the Pebble firmware.
- **[gbitmap_sequence.h](gbitmap_sequence.h.md)**: Header file for managing animated bitmap sequences, including creation, updating, and playback control.
- **[gcolor_definitions.c](gcolor_definitions.c.md)**: Functions for converting and comparing GColor types for backward compatibility in graphics.
- **[gcolor_definitions.h](gcolor_definitions.h.md)**: Defines macros for converting color values to GColor and lists named color constants for Pebble firmware.
- **[gcontext.h](gcontext.h.md)**: Defines the GContext structure and related functions for managing graphics contexts in Pebble OS.
- **[gdraw_command.c](gdraw_command.c.md)**: Functions for validating, drawing, and manipulating graphical draw commands in a firmware context.
- **[gdraw_command.h](gdraw_command.h.md)**: Defines functions and structures for manipulating Pebble Draw Commands, including drawing, modifying, and validating commands.
- **[gdraw_command_frame.c](gdraw_command_frame.c.md)**: Functions for validating, drawing, and managing `GDrawCommandFrame` objects in a graphics context.
- **[gdraw_command_frame.h](gdraw_command_frame.h.md)**: Functions and structures for manipulating GDrawCommandFrame objects in animation sequences.
- **[gdraw_command_image.c](gdraw_command_image.c.md)**: Functions for creating, copying, validating, and drawing GDrawCommandImage objects in Pebble firmware.
- **[gdraw_command_image.h](gdraw_command_image.h.md)**: Functions and structures for creating, manipulating, and drawing `GDrawCommandImage` objects.
- **[gdraw_command_list.c](gdraw_command_list.c.md)**: Functions for managing, copying, validating, and drawing `GDrawCommandList` objects in Pebble firmware.
- **[gdraw_command_list.h](gdraw_command_list.h.md)**: Defines functions and structures for manipulating and drawing GDrawCommandList objects in graphics.
- **[gdraw_command_private.h](gdraw_command_private.h.md)**: Defines data structures for drawing commands, command lists, images, frames, and sequences.
- **[gdraw_command_sequence.c](gdraw_command_sequence.c.md)**: Functions for creating, managing, and validating GDrawCommandSequence objects in the Pebble firmware.
- **[gdraw_command_sequence.h](gdraw_command_sequence.h.md)**: Functions to create, manipulate, and query GDrawCommandSequence objects for frame animation.
- **[gdraw_command_transforms.c](gdraw_command_transforms.c.md)**: Functions for scaling, transforming, and modifying graphical commands in Pebble firmware.
- **[gdraw_command_transforms.h](gdraw_command_transforms.h.md)**: Defines functions and data structures for transforming and animating graphics commands, including scaling, translation, and stroke width operations.
- **[gpath.c](gpath.c.md)**: Functions for creating, manipulating, and drawing graphical paths in a Pebble firmware context.
- **[gpath.h](gpath.h.md)**: Functions and data structures for creating, manipulating, and drawing paths in a graphics context.
- **[gpath_builder.c](gpath_builder.c.md)**: Functions for creating and manipulating graphical paths using Bezier curves in fixed-point arithmetic.
- **[gpath_builder.h](gpath_builder.h.md)**: Functions and data structures for building GPath objects without using GPathInfo.
- **[graphics.c](graphics.c.md)**: Graphics rendering functions for drawing and manipulating shapes, colors, and frame buffers in the Pebble firmware.
- **[graphics.h](graphics.h.md)**: Defines the base graphics subsystem for drawing primitives and managing the screen buffer.
- **[graphics_bitmap.c](graphics_bitmap.c.md)**: Functions for drawing and processing bitmaps, including rotation and compositing operations.
- **[graphics_bitmap.h](graphics_bitmap.h.md)**: Functions for drawing and processing bitmaps in a graphics context, including rotation and tiling.
- **[graphics_circle.c](graphics_circle.c.md)**: Functions for drawing and filling circles and ellipses with anti-aliasing and stroke options.
- **[graphics_circle.h](graphics_circle.h.md)**: Functions and types for drawing and filling circles, arcs, and ovals with various precision and modes.
- **[graphics_circle_private.h](graphics_circle_private.h.md)**: Private data structures and functions for drawing ellipses and filling oval quadrants in graphics.
- **[graphics_line.c](graphics_line.c.md)**: Functions for drawing lines with various styles, including anti-aliased, non-anti-aliased, stroked, and dotted lines.
- **[graphics_line.h](graphics_line.h.md)**: Functions for drawing various types of lines, including antialiased, stroked, and dotted lines.
- **[graphics_mask.c](graphics_mask.c.md)**: Functions for creating, recording, using, and destroying graphics masks in a graphics context.
- **[graphics_private.c](graphics_private.c.md)**: Graphics functions for setting pixels, drawing lines, and manipulating bitmaps in Pebble firmware.
- **[graphics_private.h](graphics_private.h.md)**: Internal graphics functions for pixel plotting, line drawing, and bitmap manipulation in a graphics context.
- **[graphics_private_raw.c](graphics_private_raw.c.md)**: Functions for drawing and blending lines with anti-aliasing and color blending in a graphics context.
- **[graphics_private_raw.h](graphics_private_raw.h.md)**: Declares functions and constants for raw graphics operations in the Pebble firmware.
- **[graphics_private_raw_mask.c](graphics_private_raw_mask.c.md)**: Functions for managing and applying raw graphics masks in a framebuffer context.
- **[graphics_private_raw_mask.h](graphics_private_raw_mask.h.md)**: Functions and constants for applying and manipulating raw graphics masks in Pebble firmware.
- **[gtransform.c](gtransform.c.md)**: Functions for creating, evaluating, modifying, and applying geometric transformations.
- **[gtransform.h](gtransform.h.md)**: Defines types and utility functions for creating, manipulating, and applying transformation matrices in graphics.
- **[gtypes.c](gtypes.c.md)**: Functions for geometric operations on points, vectors, rectangles, and color blending in graphics.
- **[gtypes.h](gtypes.h.md)**: Defines basic graphics types and utility functions for handling colors, points, sizes, rectangles, vectors, and bitmaps in a 2D coordinate system.
- **[LICENSE](LICENSE.md)**: MIT License for the software, allowing free use, modification, and distribution with conditions.
- **[perimeter.c](perimeter.c.md)**: Calculates display perimeter ranges for round and rectangular screens in a graphics application.
- **[perimeter.h](perimeter.h.md)**: Defines the GPerimeter structure and callback for graphics perimeter operations.
- **[text.h](text.h.md)**: Functions and data structures for text rendering and layout in a graphics context, including overflow and alignment options.
- **[text_layout.c](text_layout.c.md)**: Implements text layout and rendering functions, including iterators for lines, words, and characters, with support for UTF-8 encoding and text formatting.
- **[text_layout_private.h](text_layout_private.h.md)**: Private text layout interface for unit testing, including structures and functions for text rendering.
- **[text_render.c](text_render.c.md)**: Renders text glyphs on a display, with support for special codepoint handling and clipping.
- **[text_render.h](text_render.h.md)**: Functions and types for rendering text and handling special codepoints in a graphics context.
- **[text_resources.c](text_resources.c.md)**: Manages font resources and glyph data, including loading, caching, and decompressing glyphs for text rendering.
- **[text_resources.h](text_resources.h.md)**: Structures and functions for managing font glyph data and caching in the Pebble firmware.
- **[utf8.c](utf8.c.md)**: Functions for UTF-8 string manipulation, including decoding, iteration, and validation.
- **[utf8.h](utf8.h.md)**: Functions and data structures for UTF-8 string validation, manipulation, and iteration.
